full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0877 version 6: owner agreed that the control-plane review did not cover the full separation problem and approved adding a distinct host, container, and development environment isolation phase. The updated planning record inserts GTKB-ISOLATION-003 as Phase 3, shifts later phases to GTKB-ISOLATION-004 through GTKB-ISOLATION-009, and requires boundary planning for local harnesses, dev containers, remote development environments, Docker/Compose, CI, deployment tooling, mounts, secrets, workspace trust, and privileged execution.
explicit_change_request: Owner agreed that the broader problem includes separation of applications from host development environments and containers, and that the control-plane idea is only one part of that larger problem space.
change_reason: Update the GT-KB/application isolation phased planning record and top priority backlog to add a distinct host/container/development-environment isolation phase.
